name: Review design package and choose build method
checks: method selected; target key selected; validation rows ready
notes: Start with GEM-SC-C5 unless the goal is historical horn reference.

name: Prepare natural horn blank
tool: fine saw, scrapers, mild detergent, calipers
checks: tip closed; wall sound; volume measured

name: Fabricate slip-cast master
tool: 3D printer or 1/4 in ball end; sealant; sandpaper
checks: shrinkage scale applied; split line marked; no undercuts

name: Make plaster mold
tool: mold box, plaster, release, registration key tools
checks: keys register; pour mouth clear; cast releases

name: Prepare CNC wood halves
tool: surfacing bit, 1/4 in upcut, 1/4 in dowel drill
checks: stock oversized; dowels outside acoustic cavity; clamp clearance checked

name: Route CNC wood cavity halves
tool: 1/4 in ball end; optional 1/8 in ball end
checks: minimum wall remains; no tearout in voicing zone; cavity volume estimated
notes: Pre-CAM plan only; verify in CAM before cutting.

name: Dry-fit and leak test wood body
tool: dowel pins, masking tape, low-pressure bulb, soapy water
checks: no bubbles for 2 minutes; mating faces close fully

name: Cast ceramic body
tool: casting slip, plaster mold, drill bits, kiln
checks: wall measured; shrinkage logged; no cracks

name: Fipple block and voicing
tool: small chisels, knife, files, feeler gauges
checks: windway even; labium crisp; closed note speaks

name: Tone-hole drilling and tuning
tool: undersize bits, tapered reamers, tuner, wax
checks: holes opened low to high; cents error logged
notes: Do not oversize holes before first measured pass.

name: Final validation and documentation
notes: Feeds site and future empirical corrections.
